svg.title: CVEdge product architecture — four modes
svg.desc: Information architecture showing CV Builder, ATS Analyser, Job Match Engine, and Interview Coach as distinct modes with data flow between them
svg.text: Four distinct modes — each optimised for a different mental state in the job search
